notes: The NNF conversion procedure (def:nnf-conversion-procedure) yields an NNF formula (def:negation-normal-form); structural induction (thm:structural-induction) shows it terminates and equivalence-preserving replacement (thm:replacement-of-logical-equivalents) gives phi == result. All four load-bearing; == is transitive through replacement (same as 0073/0078).
